Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 20th, 2008 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: September 16th, 2008 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for crude and sexual content throughout, language, some comic violence and drug references.
Running Time: 87 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue

Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
